waste_items.name: Plastic Bottle
waste_items.instructions: Rinse thoroughly, remove cap, crush to save space. Deposit in yellow recycling bin.

waste_items.name: Glass Jar
waste_items.instructions: Rinse clean, remove metal lids. Do not break. Place in green glass container.

waste_items.name: Newspaper
waste_items.instructions: Keep dry. Remove any plastic wrapping. Bundle together with string.

waste_items.name: Cardboard Box
waste_items.instructions: Flatten completely. Remove all tape and staples. Keep dry.

waste_items.name: Aluminum Can
waste_items.instructions: Rinse clean, crush if possible. Place in yellow recycling bin.

waste_items.name: Battery (AA/AAA)
waste_items.instructions: NEVER put in regular trash. Take to designated battery collection point at electronics stores.

waste_items.name: Food Scraps
waste_items.instructions: Place in brown organic waste bin. No meat or dairy in home composting.

waste_items.name: Styrofoam Cup
waste_items.instructions: Cannot be recycled in most areas. Place in general waste. Avoid using.

waste_items.name: Wine Bottle
waste_items.instructions: Rinse clean, remove cork. Deposit at glass recycling bank.

waste_items.name: Mobile Phone
waste_items.instructions: Take to electronics store or e-waste collection point. Wipe data first.

waste_items.name: Pizza Box
waste_items.instructions: If heavily greasy — general waste. If clean — flatten and recycle.

waste_items.name: Tin Can
waste_items.instructions: Rinse clean. Both ends can remain attached. Place in yellow recycling bin.

waste_items.name: Yogurt Container
waste_items.instructions: Rinse clean. Check for recycling symbol. Place in yellow recycling bin.

waste_items.name: Light Bulb (LED)
waste_items.instructions: Take to hardware store recycling point. Do not put in general waste.

waste_items.name: Apple Core
waste_items.instructions: Place in brown organic bin or home compost pile.
